identity.vibe: Florida Caribbean juice — fun, laid-back, tropical, island time

palette.description: dark teal #243C3C, warm golden orange #F0A86C, deep coral orange #E4843C, warm sand/tan #A89078

ad_creative_rules: Every bottle label MUST come EXACTLY from the provided product image. Do NOT redraw, recolor, modify, or invent labels.
No mascots, cartoon characters, smiley fruits, or personified objects.
Logo appears once only, small, in a corner — no effects, no boxes, no oversized placement.
Background and color grade must use ONLY the brand palette. Replace ALL reference colors with brand colors.
Style overlay applies as final unifying step over the entire image.

products.name: Mango Passion
products.cap_rule: matte BLACK cap — always, with no exceptions; never inherit cap color from reference
